title: luwts #3887
definition:
1) to scorn, make mouths at, talk arrogantly
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to boast
        1a2) to scorn
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to mock, deride
        1b2) to interpret (language)
             1b2a) interpreter (participle)
             1b2b) ambassador (fig.)
    1c) (Hithpalpel) to be inflated, scoff, act as a scorner, show
        oneself a mocker
